description_long: This is a compact, retro-style refrigerator with a smooth, light blue exterior and rounded edges. The refrigerator features two separate doors, each equipped with a protruding rectangular handle in a matching blue color. Decorative magnets in various shapes and colors, such as stars, circles, and fruits, are attached to the front of both doors, adding a playful touch. The appliance has a solid, monolithic body with no visible seams except for the door gaps, and the sides and back are plain and unadorned. The refrigerator stands upright and appears to be of a size suitable for residential or small commercial use. No brand logos, control panels, or ventilation grilles are visible on the exterior.
description: A compact, light blue refrigerator with rounded edges, two protruding handles, and colorful decorative magnets on the front doors.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing both doors, handles, and a variety of colorful magnets attached to the front.
description_view_1: Left-side view with partial visibility of the handles and magnets, highlighting the refrigerator's depth and smooth side panel.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the plain, unadorned back and side of the refrigerator with no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the smooth, featureless back and right side, with the door seam barely visible.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding rectangular handles, horizontally oriented, placed near the edge of each door.
